mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: emotional lability, depression, mood swings, anxiety, easy fatigability, increased body weight, hirsutism, acne, bruising susceptibility, purpura, pallor, hypertension, hepatosteatosis, abdominal striae, nodular goiter, epididymitis, tip-toe gait, hypogonadism
facial edema, round face, cafe au lait spots, precocious puberty, polyostotic fibrous dysplasia, thyroid and pituitary tumors, hemorrhagic diathesis, irregular menstruation, polydactylism

short stature, obese appearance, small hands and feet, almond shaped eyes with strabismus, hypothalamic dysfunction leading to growth hormone deficiency, central hypoventilation syndrome, sleep apnea, behavior problems including temper tantrums, stubbornness, and compulsive eating

renal involvement causing proteinuria and glomerulosclerosis, angiokeratomas, corneal opacities, cardiac symptoms such as arrhythmias or left ventricular hypertrophy, hypohydrosis, anhidrosis, chronic pain, impaired hearing, decreased sweating
multiple café-au-lait macules, freckles in axillae and groin, Lisch nodes, neurofibromas, optic gliomas, scoliosis, bone deformations, learning difficulties, speech disorders
seizures, intellectual disability, autistic features, skin lesions called ash leaf spots, retinal hamartomas, shunt dependence due to hydrocephaly, kidney malformation, heart rhabdomyomas
prolonged bleeding time, mucosal membrane bleeds, ecchymoses, epistaxis, joint bleeds, family history of similar issues, normal platelet count but reduced factor VIII activity
skeletal manifestations including kyphoscoliosis, odontoid hypoplasia, short neck, narrow chest, thickened ribs, valvular heart defects, respiratory compromise, coarse facies, mental retardation

progressive psychomotor regression, macroglossia, coarsening of facial features, severe hepatomegaly, splenomegaly, hernias, characteristic skull shape, stiff joints, clouding of the lens, hearing loss
tall stature, long limbs, disproportionately long fingers, flat feet, chest deformity, mitral valve prolapse, ectopia lentis, scoliosis, pectus excavatum
